name: Indianhead
description_short: Indianhead is a public 18-hole championship golf course in Mosinee, Wisconsin, not a financial services company. It was miscategorized.
description_long: Indianhead Golf Course is located at 966 Indianhead Drive in Mosinee, Wisconsin, in the Wisconsin River Valley between Wausau and Stevens Point. The facility operates as a public golf course and recreational venue, not as a financial services or consumer finance provider. The business has been profiled in CreditDoc's system under an incorrect category that does not match its actual operations or purpose. Indianhead offers golf amenities and hospitality services typical of a full-service country club or public golf facility. The course features an 18-hole championship layout, practice facilities, dining, and event hosting capabilities. There is no evidence from the website that Indianhead engages in any financial lending, credit services, payday alternatives, emergency cash advances, or consumer finance products. This appears to be a data entry or categorization error where a golf course was mistakenly added to a financial services database. The company should either be removed from the CreditDoc platform entirely or recategorized to reflect its actual business as a recreational golf facility if CreditDoc expands to include non-financial businesses.
services: Golf outing and group event coordination
pros: Championship 18-hole course design suitable for all skill levels
PGA Professional on staff for instruction and guidance
Comprehensive practice facilities including driving range, practice green, and bunker
Full clubhouse amenities with bar, dining room, and banquet facilities
New outdoor pavilion for events and group outings
Scenic location in Northern Wisconsin forest with abundant wildlife
Event hosting and outing coordination services available
cons: Not a financial services provider—categorization is entirely incorrect
Website contains no financial products, lending terms, or consumer finance information
No contact information for financial services or customer support related to loans/credit
Listed under 'payday-alternatives' despite offering no such services
Presence in a consumer finance database creates consumer confusion and misrepresentation
best_for: Lower fees and better loan rates than banks
diagnosis: Indianhead Golf Course is not a consumer finance company and should not be profiled on CreditDoc. This is a categorization error—the business is a public golf facility in Wisconsin offering recreational and hospitality services exclusively, with no financial products, lending services, or payday alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
